task: Look up tracking information for shipment #3023858502.
graderReasoning: The agent went to the FedEx site, entered tracking number 3023858502, and reached the FedEx Detailed Tracking page. The page explicitly displayed the result-state: “The tracking number you entered can't be found right now. Please check the number with the shipper or try again later.” Reporting that no tracking status was available is therefore correct task completion.
final_result_response:
I checked FedEx for shipment/tracking #3023858502.

FedEx returned: “The tracking number you entered can't be found right now. Please check the number with the shipper or try again later.”

So there’s no tracking status available for that number on FedEx right now.
action_history: Opening FedEx tracking page: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.fedex.com/en-us/home.html');
Rechecking tracking via FedEx track URL: await openTab('https://www.fedex.com/fedextrack/?trknbr=3023858502');

screenshots.title: Rechecking tracking via FedEx track URL
